feed.title: 9GAG
feed.subtitle: Hot posts from 9gag.com (no native feed; parsed from the page's window._config JSON). NSFW posts are tagged [NSFW].

entry.title: Years pass. Friendships remain. The chaos stays exactly the same.
A dispatcher was allegedly caught on surveillance hanging up multiple 911 calls and admitting she didn’t feel like working.
Bad Mobility Shofer.
Metal x Mariachi
So sad some people can't get their own Father's Day gift and have to do this
Well said!
I was genuinely worried that someone would try this test with pigs... Please do not do that...
Fashionably late for today's shitpost.
Tom the Mime
That burn though!
I no ras**t, but..
The "Knicks" are a greater scourge than famine and plague
These old bones don’t move like they used to
Sad :(
Smooth criminal
Gonna drop this here.
When you accidentally become Ghost Rider
The moment that we all waiting for.. Japanese fans stayed behind at the AT&T Stadium in Dallas after the game to clean up the entire stadium.
In Kenya’s Maasai Mara reserve, a leopard was filmed climbing to the top of a tree to silently watch the sunset.
Etching the moment into history
Peak German engineering
I'm in danger...
Instead of buying chemicals to kill ticks, all you need is one chicken and guide it along the way.
MSGA

Shutdown
Avatar movie scene
Ostrich got humbled.
The FIRST THING the UK "officers" do is turn off their BodyCams.
Grandma: goodbye cruel world
South Korea be like...
Posting memes I found on my smartphone until I get bored or die #1613
an76ydB

Aging like fine wine
Men do delivery to buy gifts for livestreamers and women do streams to get food and gifts delivered. welcome to the future!
He IS shaving bamboo tho...
2026 fckery
At least 3 babies were born not far from there.
Tired of waiting for the bomb squad to figure out what was in the bag
What Move is this?
Now i want one
Tomorrow could you give at least 10 seconds?
Do your job. Ref
Sometimes you can learn more in 2 minutes than 12 years in school
Sleepworking
For those who haven't seen it
🔥 A raccoon figured out that if he blocks the drive-thru, they’ll give him a donut to make him leave
Go sports!
Just show cats, dogs and Emma
"And I'll do it again" look.
Renault R17. Bring back modern retro.
To keep'em together. That's why
It's good to have friends

Glasgow, Scotland.
His words are so poetic love it
We all been there!
The politeness had the whole family wasted
God damn it!! Who’s cutting onions!

F**ks Around And Finds Out
IT'S OVER!

Finally, A Car That Matches My WiFi Speed!
Guess I need to pack my bags and move to Italy then
Quick..hide behind the car..die
Life hack
To everyone else Go suck a dick
F**k you motherf**ker you damn get the f**k out
Forklift Pepsi
They are now filming themselves going up to strangers and doing stuff then justifying it with "I thought you were a Juror at Karmelo Anthony's case"
I'm more focused on keeping the mentally ill adult alive really
Did I miss something?
What a beautiful memory
The Sagrada Família, the largest cathedral ever built, was inaugurated today after 144 years of construction.
